articles.title: Solana Poised For Triple Digits, Support Set At $80
articles.description: Since reaching an all-time high of $259.90 on November 6, Solana has been declining. Solana Bulls May Push Price Above $100 So far, the price has dropped to $75.35 on February 2. The subsequent bounce confirmed the $73 area as support.
